ValidationRule.description: When picking value Door to door value from Case Category then user must choose value from Door To Door field too
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(AND( ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c,'Door To Door'), ISPICKVAL(Door_To_Door__c,''), OR ( $RecordType.Id = '01220000000MG1A', $RecordType.Id = '01220000000MFwy', $RecordType.Id = '01220000000MDhj') ),NOT( $User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You must pick a value in order to save this case
